meaning: n.踪迹,痕迹,形迹vt.跟踪,追踪,拉,拖,拖拉,(指植物)蔓生,蔓延,(指人)没精打采地走
examples: The trail starts just outside the town.
He was following a trail through the trees.
A small brown fawn hopped across the trail in front of them.
Cycling the Burke-Gilman Trail is a whole hog experience of Seattle, not just a shank.
If you build it (a trail and a cabin) then they (eager hikers) will come.
